hero.headline: Quiet capacity for serious tax & accounting practices.
hero.subheadline: Bosnia Business Hub provides MSFI- and HGB-compliant accounting and tax capacity to Austrian Steuerberater, German tax advisors, and CFOs. Discreet, GDPR-aligned, SLA-governed.

services.title: Six service lines, one engagement framework.
services.subtitle: Each engagement is governed by a dedicated partner, a documented SLA, and a fixed monthly reporting cadence. We operate as your back office — invisible to your clients.

accounting.title: BiH accounting & statutory reporting
accounting.description: General-ledger maintenance under Bosnian MSFI, PDV (VAT) optimisation, inventory accounting, and statutory year-end financial statements for BiH-registered entities.

payroll.title: Payroll & personnel administration
payroll.description: End-to-end payroll: MIP/GIP statutory filings, personnel file administration, contract drafting, and full BiH labour-law compliance — handled discreetly under your firm's letterhead.

austrian.title: Austrian outsourcing for Steuerberater
austrian.description: Austrian chart-of-accounts bookkeeping, UVA preparation, BMD/RZL workflows, digital archiving, and DSGVO-compliant file handover. Your clients never see us.

investor.title: Investor documentation & feasibility
investor.description: Investor-grade business plans, two-stage feasibility studies (prefeasibility and full viability), ROI modelling, market-entry analysis for Slovenia and the EU, and IFRS-aligned financial projections — bankable documentation for local and international investors.

fpa.title: Financial planning & analysis
fpa.description: Outsourced FP&A and controlling: monthly management reporting packs, rolling forecasts, budget vs. actuals, KPI dashboards, cash-flow modelling, and variance analysis — delivered in your firm's templates and reporting cadence.

grants.title: EU grant & IPA fund administration
grants.description: Opportunity mapping, application drafting, narrative reporting, and donor-compliant budget preparation across EU structural funds and IPA mechanisms.

whyUs.title: A decade of institutional knowledge. A practice built for the EU–BiH corridor.
whyUs.subtitle: Every deliverable ships under your brand, in your formatting templates, on your reporting calendar. Your clients meet your firm — not ours.

values.title: Regulatory depth
values.description: We navigate Bosnia's Entity, Cantonal, and State-level frameworks daily. Your firm receives clean, jurisdictionally-correct outputs — not raw data.

values.title: EU-grade infrastructure
values.description: DSGVO-aligned data handling, encrypted transfer, ISO-grade process discipline, and reporting in DE / EN / BHS.

values.title: White-label discipline
values.description: Every deliverable ships under your brand, in your formatting templates, on your reporting calendar. Your clients meet your firm — not ours.

values.title: Contractual SLAs
values.description: Monthly reporting deadlines, named account managers, and documented escalation paths — all bound by a signed service-level agreement.

testimonial.quote: We quietly introduced BBH into our Austrian accounting practice to take over a portion of our local mandates. They integrated rapidly with our processes and procedures and now deliver more than 200 billable hours per month. Most importantly, our clients are visibly happier with more responsive accountants on their files.
testimonial.author: Managing partner · Steuerberatungskanzlei · Vienna

items.v: Officially licensed to provide accounting and tax services in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
Pantheon (regional) and BMD NTCS (Austrian chart of accounts) — fully licensed, end-to-end digital workflows.
7 in-house: 1 managing partner · 2 senior accountants · 3 junior accountants · 1 office administrator.
DE / EN / BHS · monthly cadence · SLA-bound.

nearshoring.title: A structured path from first call to full integration.
nearshoring.subtitle: Three clearly defined stages. No ambiguity, no surprises — each step is documented, supervised, and SLA-governed from day one.

intro.label: Step 01
intro.title: 30-minute discovery call
intro.description: We review service scope, data-transfer protocols, and reporting standards. No commitment required, no obligation to proceed.

pilot.label: Step 02
pilot.title: 90-day pilot mandate
pilot.description: We onboard a defined set of payroll or accounting packages under partner supervision. Workflows are tested, benchmarks established, exceptions documented.

scale.label: Step 03
scale.title: Service agreement & integration
scale.description: We formalise the engagement with a signed SLA: dedicated capacity, monthly performance reviews, and a defined scaling path.

trustBar.headline: Ihr verlängerter Arm in Sarajevo
trustBar.subline: Your extended back office in Sarajevo.

contact.lede: Direct correspondence with a managing partner. Reply within one business day.
